name: IUserInterfaceSection
summary: Implement this interface in your user control to get UserInterfaceSection event notification.

methods.name: OnUserInterfaceSectionExpanding
methods.summary: The UserInterfaceSection object that called this interface method.

params.name: userInterfaceSection
params.doc: The UserInterfaceSection object that called this interface method.

params.name: expanding
params.doc: Will be true if the control has been createExpanded or false if it was collapsed.

methods.name: UserInterfaceDisplayData
methods.summary: Called by UserInterfaceSection when the selected content changes or a content field property value changes.

params.name: userInterfaceSection
params.doc: The UserInterfaceSection object that called this interface method.

params.name: renderContentList
params.doc: The currently selected list of content items to edit.

properties.name: Hidden
properties.summary: Return true if the section should be hidden, else return false.
properties.remarks: This is not to be confused with IsShown(). Hidden tells the holder whether or not to hide the section. IsShown reports the current physical state of the control.
